name: Ashnet
text: When this Byteform attacks, apply overheat 1 to the target

name: Glitchbark
text: This byteform treats spaces adjacent to nodes you control as adjacent to them.

name: Neuroclaw

name: Cerebrawl

name: Shellshock

name: Antivirus

name: Lag Switch
